clubs.name: AI Society
clubs.focus_area: Artificial intelligence, machine learning, and responsible AI projects
clubs.description: The club runs weekly hands-on sessions, peer study circles, and semester-long project pods for students interested in applied AI.
clubs.meeting_schedule: Every Wednesday at 5:30 PM in Innovation Lab 2
clubs.membership: Open to all departments. First-year students can join without prior coding experience.
recent_activities: Hosted a GenAI bootcamp with 180 participants
Built a smart attendance prototype for the campus incubator

clubs.name: Robotics Club
clubs.focus_area: Embedded systems, robotics design, and autonomous systems
clubs.description: Members build line followers, drones, and mobile robots for inter-college competitions and internal demos.
clubs.meeting_schedule: Every Friday at 4:00 PM in the Mechatronics Workshop
clubs.membership: Open to students from engineering departments after a short orientation session.
recent_activities: Won second place in the South Zone Robo Race
Conducted a soldering and sensor integration workshop

clubs.name: Entrepreneurship Cell
clubs.focus_area: Startup ideation, venture building, and founder mentoring
clubs.description: The cell connects students with mentors, startup founders, and pitch events throughout the academic year.
clubs.meeting_schedule: Alternate Saturdays at 11:00 AM in the Incubation Hub
clubs.membership: Open campus-wide for students interested in startups, product building, and business strategy.
recent_activities: Ran a founder AMA series with alumni entrepreneurs
Organized a campus startup validation sprint
